_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of mathematics, including logarithms, trigonometry, linear algebra, calculus, statistics, and operational analysis.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of statistical inference methods, including hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, Bayesian inference, and the assumptions underlying each method.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-008 (AB, cosine: 0.458), OP-K-005 (OP, cosine: 0.413).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.505). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [algebra, analysis, calculus, linear, logarithms, mathematics] vs WIDAI-only terms [assumptions, bayesian, confidence, hypothesis, inference, intervals] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.879, R=0.879). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Knowledge of mathematics, including logarithms, trigonometry, linear algebra, ca" and "Knowledge of statistical inference methods, including hypothesis testing, confid" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.462 ≈ STS 0.505 (gap 0.043). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.4%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [algebra, analysis, calculus, linear, logarithms, mathematics]. WIDAI-only: [assumptions, bayesian, confidence, hypothesis, inference, intervals].
